reviews.comment:
Muy buena comida, y atención de las chicas que sirven, buenos precios, porciones abundantes.

(Translated by Google)
Very good food, and the service from the girls who serve is excellent, good prices, and generous portions.

reviews.comment:
Por ser un ACA hay poca amabilidad por parte de los playeros, de echo hay veces que hay mucha cantidad de autos y solo hay uno atendiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Because it's an ACA, there's little friendliness from the beach attendants. In fact, sometimes there are a lot of cars and only one person is serving.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6bXJuTFFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Tardan en atender, casi una hora para un café con tostado , y hay muchísimo olor a orina en el ambiente .

(Translated by Google)
They take a long time to serve, almost an hour for a roasted coffee, and there is a strong smell of urine in the air.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6NE9yMU9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Fui al restaurante ,buena  limpieza , comida sabrosa, sencilla ,espere  bastante y me trajeron para mi gusto la comida fría pero es cuestión de ir otra vez a ver que pasa

(Translated by Google)
I went to the restaurant; it was clean, the food was tasty and simple. I waited quite a while, and the food was cold, in my opinion, but I'll have to go back and see what happens.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqdnJxYWhBRRAB
